CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, num_string String);
SELECT id, toFloat32OrZero(num_string) AS float_value FROM test_table WHERE id < 4;
SELECT id, toFloat32OrZero(num_string) AS float_value FROM test_table ORDER BY float_value DESC;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN toFloat32OrZero(num_string) = 0 THEN 'Invalid' ELSE 'Valid' END AS validity FROM test_table;
SELECT id, toFloat32OrZero(num_string) AS float_value FROM (SELECT id, num_string FROM test_table WHERE id > 2) AS sub_query;
SELECT value, toFloat32OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM another_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE toFloat32OrZero(num_string) = 0;
SELECT toFloat32OrZero('1000') + toFloat32OrZero((SELECT num_string FROM test_table WHERE id = 1)) AS total;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE toFloat32OrZero(num_string) > 50 AND id < 3;
